summary: Iteration 96 - Shop Page + Cashfree Payment Integration verified. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend Shop page loads with products, Add to Cart, Cart sidebar, Checkout form with COD and Online payment options. Cashfree integration returns valid payment_session_id for online orders.
critical_code_review_comments: Shop route correctly added at /shop in App.js (line 29: ShopPage lazy import)
Shop link visible in desktop nav, mobile menu, and footer
Shop.js handleCheckout correctly uses Cashfree SDK for online payments (lines 227-256)
Backend /api/shop/orders creates Cashfree orders for payment_method='online' (lines 7345-7423)
Cashfree production credentials correctly configured in server.py
payment_session_id returned in correct format for Cashfree SDK (starts with 'session_')

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Shop flows verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: None - Products already seeded in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page with Cashfree integration fully working. Key verification points: (1) /shop route loads with 9 products, (2) Add to Cart updates cart count, (3) Cart sidebar shows products with total, (4) Checkout form has Full Name, Phone, Email, Delivery options (Store Pickup/Home Delivery), Payment options (Cash on Store/Pay Online), (5) POST /api/shop/orders with payment_method='online' returns cashfree_order_id and payment_session_id, (6) POST /api/shop/orders with payment_method='cod' returns null for Cashfree fields.

features_verified.5. Add to Cart button: VERIFIED - Adds product, shows cart count
features_verified.6. Cart sidebar: VERIFIED - Opens with products and total
features_verified.8. Checkout form fields: VERIFIED - Full Name, Phone, Email, Delivery options, Payment options
features_verified.9. Payment options: VERIFIED - 'Cash on Store' and 'Pay Online (UPI/Card/Net Banking)'
features_verified.12. Backend Online order: VERIFIED - Creates Cashfree order with payment_session_id
